name: omo
description: One Codex plugin namespace for Yeongyu's local Codex components.

interface.longDescription: OMO exposes the local Codex Rules, Comment Checker, LSP, Ultrawork, and Ultragoal components as one plugin namespace while keeping each component isolated under components/ for maintenance.
